summary: Iteration 74 - UI/Navigation Changes Testing: All tests PASSED. FilmPipeline integration verified with new Select dropdowns for genre/subgenre, 'Produci!' nav/card rename, IN ATTESA quick card removal, and CIAK! card navigation to /create-film?tab=shooting.

navigation_tests.top_nav_produci_item: PASS - 'Produci!' with Clapperboard icon visible in top nav bar
navigation_tests.dashboard_produci_card: PASS - PRODUCI! card exists in quick cards grid and navigates to /create-film
navigation_tests.ciak_tab_active: PASS - Shooting tab (6th tab) is highlighted after navigation
navigation_tests.myfilms_crea_button: PASS - MyFilms page 'Crea' button navigates to /create-film

dashboard_tests.in_attesa_quick_card_removed: PASS - IN ATTESA quick card NOT present in quick cards grid
dashboard_tests.quick_cards_present: PASS - Found: Festival, Produci!, Pre-Ingaggio, Sceneggiature, Contest, Sfide, Ciak!
dashboard_tests.pending_films_section_separate: PASS - 'FILM IN ATTESA DI RILASCIO' exists as separate section (not quick card)

filmpipeline_tests.genre_select_dropdown: PASS - Genre Select dropdown found with data-testid='genre-select'
filmpipeline_tests.genre_options_in_dropdown: PASS - 17 genre options in dropdown (Action, Comedy, Drama, etc.)
filmpipeline_tests.subgenre_select_after_genre: PASS - Subgenre Select dropdown appears after selecting genre

critical_code_review_comments: Top nav navItems correctly updated with Clapperboard icon and '/create-film' path (App.js line 268)
Dashboard quick cards grid has 7 cards: Festival, Produci!, Pre-Ingaggio, Sceneggiature, Contest, Sfide, Ciak! (Dashboard.jsx lines 871-917)
CIAK! card correctly navigates to '/create-film?tab=shooting' (Dashboard.jsx line 910)
FilmPipeline uses Shadcn Select components for genre/subgenre instead of button grid (FilmPipeline.jsx lines 91-114)
Both /create and /create-film routes correctly point to FilmPipeline component (App.js lines 1458-1459)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/Navigation changes fully verified. Top nav shows 'Produci!' with Clapperboard icon at /create-film. Dashboard quick cards: Festival, Produci!, Pre-Ingaggio, Sceneggiature, Contest, Sfide, Ciak! (no IN ATTESA). CIAK! navigates to /create-film?tab=shooting. FilmPipeline uses Select dropdowns for genre/subgenre selection. The 'FILM IN ATTESA DI RILASCIO' section still exists on dashboard as a separate section (not a quick card) - this is correct as it was only the quick card that needed removal.
verified_features: Top nav 'Produci!' item with Clapperboard icon navigating to /create-film
'IN ATTESA' quick card removed from dashboard quick cards grid
FilmPipeline genre selection using Shadcn Select dropdown
FilmPipeline subgenre selection using Shadcn Select dropdown
